statement.en: Gene Selection for Breast Cancer Classification Using T-Test Filtering and Wrapper-Based Optimization

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: This is a preprint dated 2026-04-25 (future date, likely provisional/metadata artifact) describing a computational methodology combining statistical filtering (t-test) with wrapper-based feature selection for gene classification. The core approach—t-test + wrapper optimization—is established, but the specific application's empirical validation status is unknown without peer review or benchmark results. Classified as FLOWING because it represents work under validation/not yet peer-confirmed.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 遺伝子の声が統計的重みで増幅され、モデルの欲望に従って最良の組み合わせへ収束する。

visualGlyph.interpretation: 無数の遺伝子が試されて消え、最後に選ばれた数個だけが診断という光へ導く。
